description_long: This rifle features a robust metal receiver and barrel assembly paired with wooden furniture, including a fixed stock, foregrip, and pistol grip. The wood components display a rich, brown grain pattern, contrasting with the matte gray metal parts. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine that extends downward from the receiver. Iron sights are mounted along the top of the barrel and receiver for aiming. The muzzle is simple, lacking any visible device such as a flash hider or suppressor. The overall design is reminiscent of early to mid-20th-century submachine guns, with a utilitarian and rugged appearance.
description: A classic rifle with a gray metal body, brown wooden stock and grips, detachable box magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, foregrip, and pistol grip, as well as the box magazine and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the wooden components and magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the stock and the top alignment of the barrel and sights.
